leadText: Searing Shot (Japanese: かえんだん Flame Projectile) is a damage-dealing Fire-type move introduced in Generation V. It is one of the signature moves of Victini.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Sword and Shield 1.1.2 Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl 1.2 Generation IX Effect [ edit | edit source ] Searing Shot deals damage and has a 30% chance to burn the target. It does not affect opponents with Bulletproof . Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Sword and Shield [ edit | edit source ] From Versions 1.0 to 1.2.1 of Pokémon Sword and Shield , Searing Shot could not be selected in a battle. Starting with Version 1.3.0, it is usable and functions the same as it did in previous generations. Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Searing Shot cannot be selected in a battle. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Searing Shot cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 An inferno of scarlet flames torches everything around the user. It may leave the target with a burn. X Y OR AS The user torches everything around it with an inferno of scarlet flames. This may also leave those hit with a burn. S M US UM P E Sw Sh LA S V The user torches everything around it in an inferno of scarlet flames. This may also leave those it hits with a burn. BD SP This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI It damages nearby enemies. It could also cause the Burn status condition. With the Burn status, they keep taking damage, and their Attack also goes down slightly. S MD It could leave enemies with a burn and keep damaging them. * It damages nearby enemies. It could also leave them with a burn. *

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Since Generation VI , Searing Shot has the same description text as Lava Plume .
